display.purpose: Main headers and final verdict titles.

body.purpose: Prose explanations and fact checking details.

label.purpose: Meta details, logs, hash and timestamps.

shadows.name: receipt-shadow
shadows.purpose: Gives physical card depth over warm background.

shadows.name: micro-lift
shadows.purpose: Elevates physical input buttons on hover.

motion.name: reveal-smooth
motion.purpose: Transition of physical buttons front card.

motion.name: accordion-slide
motion.purpose: Accordion expand animation for thinking steps.

components.name: Physical Icon Button
components.description: Premium 3D-rotated large icon button used for main elderly inputs (Text, Voice, Camera).
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; position: relative; width: 88px; height: 88px; perspective: 384px; transform-style: preserve-3d; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; margin-bottom: 30px; } .ds-icon-btn__back { border-radius: 24px; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: #008a4f; box-shadow: 8px -8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18); transform: rotate(15deg); transform-origin: 100% 100%; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.83, 0, 0.17, 1); } .ds-icon-btn__front { border-radius: 24px; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75); border: 2px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.83, 0, 0.17, 1), background-color 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; } .ds-icon-btn svg { width: 35px; height: 35px; color: #008a4f; } .ds-icon-btn__label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 900; color: #000000; white-space: nowrap; text-align: center; position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(12px); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.83, 0, 0.17, 1); } .ds-icon-btn:hover .ds-icon-btn__back { transform: rotate(25deg) translate3d(-8px, -8px, 8px); } .ds-icon-btn:hover .ds-icon-btn__front { transform: translate3d(0, 0, 32px); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .ds-icon-btn:hover .ds-icon-btn__label { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(16px); }

components.name: Verification Receipt
components.description: Sawtooth receipt representing the final immutable check report.
components.html:
FACT CHECK RECEIPT

TIME: 2026-06-27 11:34:00

The earth is flat?

This statement is verified to be false. Scientific measurements and space photography confirm the spherical nature of earth.
components.css: .ds-receipt { position: relative; background: #FAF8F5; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(44, 44, 44, 0.06); padding: 24px; max-width: 320px; font-family: sans-serif; color: #2C2C2C; } .ds-sawtooth-top { position: absolute; top: -6px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 6px; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #FAF8F5 4.2px, transparent 0), linear-gradient(45deg, #FAF8F5 4.2px, transparent 0); background-repeat: repeat-x; background-size: 8px 6px; } .ds-sawtooth-bottom { position: absolute; bottom: -6px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 6px; background: linear-gradient(-135deg, #FAF8F5 4.2px, transparent 0), linear-gradient(135deg, #FAF8F5 4.2px, transparent 0); background-repeat: repeat-x; background-size: 8px 6px; } .ds-receipt__header { text-align: center; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-receipt__header h4 { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .ds-receipt__header p { margin: 4px 0 0 0; font-size: 10px; font-family: monospace; opacity: 0.5; } .ds-receipt__divider { border-bottom: 2px dashed #e2decb; margin: 16px 0; } .ds-receipt__content h5 { margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-receipt__content p { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; opacity: 0.8; }

narrative.northStar: 纸质账单与印章核据 (The Stamped Invoice)
narrative.overview: 本设计系统旨在为视力、交互反应处于退化阶段的数字银发族，营造一种极具安全感与直观度的数字事实核查环境。通过“纸质核查小票”与“物理防伪印章”的视觉隐喻，让大语言模型的抽象文本结果转化为长辈熟悉的实体凭证。
keyCharacteristics: 实体触感：三维微凸玻璃态按键，撕裂边缘锯齿，拟真度高。
高确定性：无多余修饰性渐变，用纯色色块印章确定证实、伪造结论。
听觉辅助：全流程打字机、盖章重响，以多维反馈筑牢信任基础。

rules.name: The Rare Accent Rule
rules.body: 证实绿、伪造红、存疑黄仅能出现在状态印章、首要提交动作、及对应分类卡片的描边上，任何页面中上述三种高饱和度语义色的覆盖面积不得超过 10%。

rules.name: The Non-Fluid Product Rule
rules.body: 为了防止在不同分辨率下字体无极缩放导致界面结构错位（特别是长辈大字重组），禁止在应用内部使用流式排版（如 `vw` 字体单位），必须使用明确的响应式字号。

rules.name: The Flat At Rest Rule
rules.body: 所有卡片、按钮在静止（At Rest）状态下均无明显厚重阴影。投影仅在用户产生悬停（Hover）或焦点激活（Focus）时作为微小的物理力学弹力回馈呈现。

dos: Do 保证长辈模式下的段落行高至少为 1.6 倍以上，预防长辈阅读发生视觉串行。
Do 在渲染 Mermaid 逻辑因果图时提供自适应的手势缩放（Zoom）和滚轮拖拽事件，以便放大查看细节。
Do 每一个页面图片资源都经过同源接口 `/api/proxy-image` 中转，以防 Canvas 污染破坏截图卡片的正常导出。
donts: Don't 在正文背景与文本之间使用低于 4.5:1 的对比度。严禁使用浅灰色文字表示说明。
Don't 对大图标或图像直接在 hover 时施加缩放动画，避免老年用户产生视觉错乱（遵循禁止悬停缩放图片准则）。
Don't 嵌套卡片。小票即为唯一的内容承载卡，小票内不得再嵌套次级白底卡片。
